road_damage.text: How deep does the pothole or damage appear to be?
Is the damage currently affecting traffic flow?
Are there any loose rocks or debris around the damaged area?

garbage.text: What type of waste is primarily visible?
Is the waste blocking a pedestrian pathway or road?
Please provide any additional details about the smell or hazards (if any):

drainage.text: Is the water stagnant or actively overflowing?
Does the overflow seem to be caused by a visible blockage?
Is the water entering nearby properties or shops?

streetlight.text: What is the specific issue with the streetlight?
Are multiple streetlights out in the same area?

water_leak.text: Is the leak coming from a public pipe or private property boundary?

default.text: Can you describe the issue in a few more words?
Is this issue posing an immediate danger to the public?
